negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_256
prompt: The video opens with a scene set in an outdoor dining area, shaded by large green trees. Three closed red umbrellas are seen behind the table and chairs with a red-and-white checkered tablecloth. Four individuals are seated around the table: two men and one woman, all engaged in conversation and enjoying their meal. The man on the left wears a checkered shirt and glasses, while the woman in the middle dons a brown top, and the man on the right sports a black t-shirt. The table is set with plates, glasses filled with a golden beverage, and a large black circular pot containing a stew or soup. A waiter, dressed in a white shirt and dark pants, is seen bending over the table, using a ladle to serve food from the pot into individual bowls. The background features a stone wall and a glimpse of a street with passing vehicles.  As the video progresses, the focus shifts to a close-up of the stew in the black pot. The camera zooms in on the yellowish broth filled with chunks of vegetables and possibly meat. A hand holding a ladle stirs the stew, lifting a portion to reveal its thick consistency and vibrant ingredients. The spoon scoops up a generous amount of the stew, showcasing the texture and the variety of colors within the dish. The red-and-white checkered tablecloth remains visible beneath the pot, maintaining continuity with the earlier scene.
